nasb.text: Then David and the people who were with him lifted their voices and wept until there was no strength in them to weep.

esv.text: Then David and the people who were with him raised their voices and wept until they had no more strength to weep.

cnv.text: 就放聲大哭，直哭到沒有力氣再哭。

ccb.text: 便放声大哭，直哭得精疲力尽。
